name: autodoc-pydantic

metadata.name: autodoc_pydantic
metadata.summary: Seamlessly integrate pydantic models in your Sphinx documentation.

documentation:
![Autodoc Pydantic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mansenfranzen/autodoc_pydantic/main/docs/source/material/logo_black.svg) [![PyPI - Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/autodoc_pydantic?style=for-the-badge&logo=python&logoColor=white)](https://pypi.org/project/autodoc_pydantic/) [![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/python-3.8+-blue.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=python&logoColor=white)](https://www.python.org/) [![PyPI - Downloads](https://img.shields.io/pypi/dm/autodoc_pydantic?style=for-the-badge&logo=python&logoColor=white&color=blue)](https://pypistats.org/packages/autodoc-pydantic) [![GitHub Actions Workflow Status](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/mansenfranzen/autodoc_pydantic/tests-push-pr.yml?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/mansenfranzen/autodoc_pydantic/actions) [![Codecov](https://img.shields.io/codecov/c/gh/mansenfranzen/autodoc_pydantic?style=for-the-badge&logo=codecov)](https://app.codecov.io/gh/mansenfranzen/autodoc_pydantic) [![Read the Docs (stable)](https://img.shields.io/readthedocs/autodoc_pydantic/stable?style=for-the-badge&logo=sphinx&label=Docs%20stable)](https://autodoc-pydantic.readthedocs.io/en/stable/) [![GitHub License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/mansenfranzen/autodoc_pydantic?style=for-the-badge&color=orange&logo=semanticscholar&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/mansenfranzen/autodoc_pydantic/blob/main/LICENSE) [![linting - ruff](https://img.shields.io/badge/Linting-orange?style=for-the-badge&logo=ruff&logoColor=white&label=ruff)](https://github.com/astral-sh/ruff) [![types - Mypy](https://img.shields.io/badge/types-Mypy-orange.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=python&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/python/mypy) [![All Contributors](https://img.shields.io/badge/all_contributors-55-orange.svg?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/mansenfranzen/autodoc_pydantic?tab=readme-ov-file#-acknowledgements) You love [pydantic](https://pydantic-docs.helpmanual.io/) ❤ and you want to document your models and configuration settings with [sphinx](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/)? Perfect, let's go. But wait, sphinx' [autodoc](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/usage/extensions/autodoc.html) does not integrate too well with pydantic models 😕. Don't worry - just `pip install autodoc_pydantic` ☺. # 🌟 Features - 💬 provides default values, alias and constraints for model fields - 🔗 adds hyperlinks between validators and corresponding fields - 📃 includes collapsable model json schema - 🏄 natively integrates with autodoc and autosummary extensions - 📎 defines explicit pydantic prefixes for models, settings, fields, validators and model config - 📋 shows summary section for model configuration, fields and validators - 👀 hides overloaded and redundant model class signature - 🔱 visualizes entity-relationship-diagrams for class hierarchies - 🔨 allows complete configurability on global and per-model level - 🍀 supports `pydantic >= 1.5.0` and `sphinx >= 4.0.0` # 📄 Documentation | Section | Description | |-----------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------| | [📑 Landing Page](https://autodoc-pydantic.readthedocs.io/en/stable/) | Guides and detailed information. | | [🛠️ Installation](https://autodoc-pydantic.readthedocs.io/en/stable/users/installation.html) | Setup and installation procedures. | | [🔧 Configuration](https://autodoc-pydantic.readthedocs.io/en/stable/users/configuration.html) | System or application settings. | | [💡 Usage](https://autodoc-pydantic.readthedocs.io/en/stable/users/usage.html) | How to use the application or tool. | | [🌐 Examples](https://autodoc-pydantic.readthedocs.io/en/stable/users/examples.html) | Showcase and usage examples. | | [👨‍💻 Developer Guide](https://autodoc-pydantic.readthedocs.io/en/stable/developers/setup.html) | In-depth guide for developers. | # 🙏 Acknowledgements Thanks to great open source projects [sphinx](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/), [pydantic](https://pydantic-docs.helpmanual.io/) and [poetry](https://python-poetry.org/) (and so many more) ❤ in addition to the following contributors:

functions.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.events.add_fallback_css_class
documentation:
Used as `object-description-transform` sphinx event to add default css
classes to autodoc_pydantic's custom auto-documenter.

modules.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.utility
documentation: This module contains various utility functions.

functions.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.utility.import_module
documentation: Simple importer intercepting import exception.

functions.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.utility.get_version
documentation: Get version info from standard __version__.

functions.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.utility.get_version_special
documentation: Get version info from version.VERSION.

functions.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.utility.show_versions
documentation: Print currently used versions.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.utility.CustomEnum
documentation:
Customized enum to provide all values via `values` and
which allows direct value access upon lookup.

# Examples

```pycon
>>> class Options(CustomEnum):
>>>     OPTION1 = "opt1"
>>>     OPTION2 = "opt2"
```

```pycon
>>> Options.OPTION1
"opt1"
>>> Options.values()
{"opt1", "opt2"}
```

modules.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.enums
documentation: This module contains custom option enumerations.

documentation: Contains the extension setup.

documentation: Adds custom css to HTML output.

functions.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.application.add_domain_object_types
documentation:
Hack to add object types to already instantiated python domain since
`add_object_type` currently only works for std domain.

documentation: Adds all configuration values to sphinx application.

Adds custom pydantic directives and autodocumenters to sphinx
application.

documentation: This module contains custom directive option validator functions.

documentation:
Option validator function used to convert the `:members:` option for
auto directives.

functions.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.validators.option_one_of_factory

Option validator factory to create a option validation function which
allows only one value of given set of provided `choices`.

functions.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.validators.option_default_true
documentation:
Option validator used to define boolean options with default to True if
no argument is passed.

functions.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.validators.option_list_like
documentation: Option validator used to define a set of items.

modules.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.definition
documentation: This module contains the autodocumenter's option definitions.

documentation: Represents added directive options for {class}`PydanticFieldDocumenter`.

variables.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.definition.OPTIONS_VALIDATOR
documentation: Represents added directive options for {class}`PydanticValidatorDocumenter`.

variables.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.definition.OPTIONS_MODEL
documentation: Represents added directive options for {class}`PydanticModelDocumenter`.

variables.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.definition.OPTIONS_SETTINGS

modules.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.utility
documentation:
This module contains various utility functions which are relevant for
autodocumenters and directives.

functions.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.utility.create_field_href
documentation: Create `pending_xref` node with link to given `reference`.

functions.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.utility.remove_node_by_tagname
documentation: Removes node from list of `nodes` with given `tagname` in place.

functions.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.utility.intercept_type_annotations_py_gt_39
documentation:
Helper function to modify string representation of annotated types for
python < 3.9. Without modification, an annotated int will result in
`int[int]` instead of `int`.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.utility.NullType
documentation:
Helper class to present a Null value which is not the same
as python's `None`. This represents a missing value, or no
value at all by convention. It should be used as a singleton.

modules.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.templates
documentation: This module contains reST templates used by autodocumenters and directives.

functions.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.templates.to_collapsable
documentation:
Place given lines into a collapsable HTML block.

Parameters
----------
lines: list
    The actual content, that should be placed into a collapsable block.
title: str
    The name of the collapsable block title.
css_class: str
    Name of the css class for the collapsable block.

modules.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites
documentation:
This module contains composite helper classes for **autodoc_pydantic**
autodocumenters and directives. They mainly intend to encapsulate the
management of directive options.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.DirectiveOptions

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.DirectiveOptions.add_default_options
documentation: Adds all default options.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.DirectiveOptions.determine_app_cfg_name
documentation:
Provide full app environment configuration name for given option
name while converting "-" to "_".

Parameters
----------
name: str
    Name of the option.

Returns
-------
full_name: str
    Full app environment configuration name.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.DirectiveOptions.is_available
documentation:
Configurations may be disabled for documentation purposes. If the
directive option `__doc_disable_except__` exists, it contains the
only available configurations.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.DirectiveOptions.get_app_cfg_by_name
documentation:
Get configuration value from app environment configuration.
If `name` does not exist, return NONE.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.DirectiveOptions.get_value
documentation:
Get option value for given `name`. First, looks for explicit
directive option values (e.g. :member-order:) which have highest
priority. Second, if no directive option is given, get the default
option value provided via the app environment configuration.

Parameters
----------
name: str
    Name of the option.
prefix: bool
    If True, add `pyautodoc_prefix` to name.
force_availability: bool
    It is disabled by default however some default configurations like
    `model-summary-list-order` need to be activated all the time.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.DirectiveOptions.is_false
documentation:
Check if option with `name` is False. First, looks for explicit
directive option values (e.g. :member-order:) which have highest
priority. Second, if no directive option is given, get the default
option value provided via the app environment configuration.

Enforces result to be either True or False.

Parameters
----------
name: str
    Name of the option.
prefix: bool
    If True, add `pyautodoc_prefix` to name.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.DirectiveOptions.is_true
documentation:
Check if option with `name` is True. First, looks for explicit
directive option values (e.g. :member-order:) which have highest
priority. Second, if no directive option is given, get the default
option value provided via the app environment configuration.

Enforces result to be either True or False.

Parameters
----------
name: str
    Name of the option.
prefix: bool
    If True, add `pyautodoc_prefix` to name.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.DirectiveOptions.exists
documentation:
Check if option with `name` is set. First, looks for explicit
directive option values (e.g. :member-order:) which have highest
priority. Second, if no directive option is given, get the default
option value provided via the app environment configuration.

Enforces result to be either True or False.

Parameters
----------
name: str
    Name of the option.
prefix: bool
    If True, add `pyautodoc_prefix` to name.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.DirectiveOptions.set_default_option
documentation:
Set default option value for given `name` from app environment
configuration if an explicit directive option was not provided.

Parameters
----------
name: str
    Name of the option.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.DirectiveOptions.set_members_all
documentation:
Specifically sets the :members: option to ALL if activated via
app environment settings and not deactivated locally by directive
option.

Composite class providing methods to manage getting and setting
configuration values from global app configuration and local directive
options.

This class is tightly coupled with autodoc pydantic autodocumenters because
it accesses class attributes of the parent class.

The documenter class' `option` attribute is sometimes modified in order to
apply autodoc pydantic's rules (e.g. modifying :members:). Since the
`option` attribute may be shared between documenter instances (may be a
bug) in sphinx, an independent copy of the `option` attribute is created
for every autodoc pydantic autodocumenter. This relates to #21.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.AutoDocOptions

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.AutoDocOptions.configuration_names
documentation:
Returns all configuration names that exist for `autodoc_pydantic`.

This is used by {obj}`determine_app_cfg_name` to identify
configuration names that do not need to be prefixed. This is used when
options of foreign documenters are accessed (e.g. validator documenter
needs to read configuration values from field documenter).

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.AutoDocOptions.determine_app_cfg_name
documentation:
Provide full app environment configuration name for given option
name. It contains some logic to get the correct env configuration name,
e.g. for pydantic model as follows:

model-show-field-list -> autodoc_pydantic_model_show_field_list
undoc-members -> autodoc_pydantic_model_undoc_members
field-swap-name-and-alias -> autodoc_pydantic_field_swap_name_and_alias

Parameters
----------
name: str
    Name of the option.

Returns
-------
full_name: str
    Full app environment configuration name.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.AutoDocOptions.add_pass_through_to_directive
documentation: Intercepts documenters `add_directive_header` and adds pass through.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.options.composites.AutoDocOptions.pass_option_to_directive
documentation: Pass an autodoc option through to the generated directive.

Composite class providing methods to handle getting and setting
autodocumenter directive option values.

modules.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives
documentation: This module contains **autodoc_pydantic**'s directives.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticDirectiveMixin

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticDirectiveMixin.get_signature_prefix
documentation: Overwrite original signature prefix with custom pydantic ones.
Base class for pydantic directive providing common functionality.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticModel

class_variables.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticModel.option_spec
documentation: type: ignore[misc]
Specialized directive for pydantic models.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticSettings

class_variables.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticSettings.option_spec
documentation: type: ignore[misc]
Specialized directive for pydantic settings.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticField

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticField.get_field_name
documentation:
Get field name from signature. Borrows implementation from
`PyObject.handle_signature`.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticField.add_required
documentation: Add `[Required]` if directive option `required` is set.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticField.add_optional
documentation: Add `[Optional]` if directive option `optional` is set.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticField.add_alias_or_name
documentation:
Add alias or name to signature.

Alias is added if `show-alias` is enabled. Name is added if both
`show-alias` and `swap-name-and-alias` is enabled.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticField._find_desc_name_node
documentation:
Return `desc_name` node  from `signode` that contains the field
name. This is used to replace the name with the alias.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticField.swap_name_and_alias
documentation:
Replaces name with alias if `swap-name-and-alias` is enabled.

Requires to replace existing `addnodes.desc_name` because name node is
added within `handle_signature` and this can't be intercepted or
overwritten otherwise.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticField.handle_signature
documentation: Optionally call add alias method.

class_variables.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticField.option_spec
documentation: type: ignore[misc]
Specialized directive for pydantic fields.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticValidator

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticValidator.get_field_href_from_mapping
documentation:
Generate the field reference node aka `pending_xref` from given
validator-field `mapping` while respecting field name/alias swap
possibility.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticValidator.replace_return_node
documentation: Replaces the return node with references to validated fields.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticValidator.handle_signature
documentation: Optionally call replace return node method.

class_variables.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.directives.PydanticValidator.option_spec
documentation: type: ignore[misc]
Specialized directive for pydantic validators.

modules.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection
documentation:
This module contains the inspection functionality for pydantic models. It
is used to retrieve relevant information about fields, validators, config and
schema of pydantical models.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ValidatorAdapter

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ValidatorAdapter.name
documentation: Return the validators function name.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ValidatorAdapter.class_name
documentation:
Return the validators class name. It might be None if validator
is not bound to a class.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ValidatorAdapter.module
documentation: Return the validators module name.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ValidatorAdapter.object_path
documentation: Return the fully qualified object path of the validators function.

Provide standardized interface to pydantic's validator objects with
additional metadata (e.g. root validator) for internal usage in
autodoc_pydantic.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ValidatorFieldMap

class_variables.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ValidatorFieldMap.field_name
documentation: Name of the field.

class_variables.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ValidatorFieldMap.validator_name
documentation: Name of the validator.

class_variables.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ValidatorFieldMap.field_ref
documentation: Reference to field.

class_variables.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ValidatorFieldMap.validator_ref
documentation: Reference to validataor.
Contains single mapping of a pydantic validator and field.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.BaseInspectionComposite
documentation:
Serves as base class for inspector composites which are coupled to
`ModelInspector` instances. Each composite provides a separate namespace to
handle different areas of pydantic models (e.g. fields and validators).

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.FieldInspector

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.FieldInspector.names
documentation: Return field names while keeping ordering.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.FieldInspector.get
documentation: Get the instance of `FieldInfo` for given field `name`.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.FieldInspector.get_alias_or_name
documentation:
Get the alias of a pydantic field if given. Otherwise, return the
field name.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.FieldInspector.get_property_from_field_info
documentation: Get specific property value from pydantic's field info.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.FieldInspector._get_meta_items
documentation:
Helper method to extract constraint names and values from different
pydantic Metadata objects such as `pydantic.types.Strict`.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.FieldInspector.get_constraints
documentation: Get constraints for given `field_name`.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.FieldInspector.is_required
documentation:
Check if a given pydantic field is required/mandatory. Returns True,
if a value for this field needs to provided upon model creation.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.FieldInspector.has_default_factory
documentation:
Check if field has a `default_factory` being set. This information
is used to determine if a pydantic field is optional or not.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.FieldInspector.is_json_serializable
documentation:
Check if given pydantic field is JSON serializable by calling
pydantic's `model.schema()` method. Custom objects might not be
serializable and hence would break JSON schema generation.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.FieldInspector._is_json_serializable
documentation: Ensure JSON serializability for given pydantic `FieldInfo`.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.FieldInspector._test_field_serializabiltiy
documentation: Test JSON serializability for given pydantic `FieldInfo`.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.FieldInspector.non_json_serializable
documentation: Get all fields that can't be safely JSON serialized.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.FieldInspector.__bool__
documentation: Equals to False if no fields are present.
Provide namespace for inspection methods for fields of pydantic models.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ValidatorInspector

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ValidatorInspector.values
documentation: Returns set of all available validators.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ValidatorInspector.get_reused_validators_names
documentation:
Identify all reused validators. This is done implicitly by relying
on the fact the reused validators are registered as unbound functions
instead of bound methods.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ValidatorInspector.names
documentation: Return names of all validators of pydantic model.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ValidatorInspector.__bool__
documentation: Equals to False if no validators are present.

Provide namespace for inspection methods for validators of pydantic
models.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ConfigInspector

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ConfigInspector._get_values_per_type
documentation:
Get the configuration values from any pydantic model.

Behavior of configuration values varies between `BaseModel` and
BaseSettings`. For `BaseModel`, if no configs are provided, then
model_config` is empty. However, for `BaseSettings`, `model_config`
contains a predefined set of values. This needs to be handled properly
otherwise the `BaseSettings` always show up a lot of irrelevant default
values. Hence, the default values are removed.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ConfigInspector.is_configured
documentation: Check if pydantic model config was explicitly configured.

Provide namespace for inspection methods for config class of pydantic
models.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ReferenceInspector

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ReferenceInspector.model_path
documentation: Retrieve the full path of the model.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ReferenceInspector.create_model_reference
documentation:
Create reference for given attribute `name` returning full path
including the model path.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ReferenceInspector._create_mappings
documentation:
Generate reference mappings between validators and corresponding
fields.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ReferenceInspector.filter_by_validator_name
documentation: Return mappings for given validator `name`.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ReferenceInspector.filter_by_field_name
documentation: Return mappings for given field `name`.

Provide namespace for inspection methods for creating references
mainly between pydantic fields and validators.

Importantly, `mappings` provides the set of all `ValidatorFieldMap`
instances which contain all references between fields and validators.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.SchemaInspector

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.SchemaInspector.sanitized
documentation:
Get model's `schema` while handling non serializable fields. Such
fields will be replaced by TypeVars.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.SchemaInspector.create_sanitized_model
documentation:
Generates a new pydantic model from the original one while
substituting invalid fields with typevars.

Provide namespace for inspection methods for general properties of
pydantic models.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.StaticInspector

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.StaticInspector.is_pydantic_model
documentation: Determine if object is a valid pydantic model.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.StaticInspector.is_pydantic_field
documentation: Determine if given `field` is a pydantic field.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.StaticInspector.is_validator_by_name
documentation:
Determine if a validator is present under provided `name` for given
`model`.
Namespace under `ModelInspector` for static methods.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ModelInspector

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ModelInspector.get_field_validator_mapping
documentation:
Collect all available validators keyed by their corresponding
fields including post/pre root validators.

Validators are wrapped into `ValidatorAdapters` to provide uniform
interface within autodoc_pydantic.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.inspection.ModelInspector.from_child_signode
documentation:
Create instance from a child `signode` as used within sphinx
directives.
Provides inspection functionality for pydantic models.

modules.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters
documentation: This module contains **autodoc_pydantic**'s autodocumenters.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticAutoDoc

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticAutoDoc.model
documentation:
Lazily load pydantic model after initialization. For more, please
read `inspect` doc string.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticAutoDoc.options
documentation:
Provides access to {obj}`PydanticDocumenterOptions` to handle
global and local configuration settings.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticAutoDoc.inspect
documentation:
Provides {obj}`ModelInspector` to access all inspection methods.
You may wonder why this `inspect` is a property instead of a simple
attribute being defined in the `__init__` method of this class. The
reason is the following: auto-documenters do not have their `object`
attribute being correctly set after instantiation which typically holds
a reference to the corresponding pydantic model and objects to be
documented. Instead, `object` is `None` after plain instantiation
(executing `__init__`). However, this composite class is added during
instantiation of the autodocumenter for consistency reasons. Therefore,
`ModelInspector` can't be created at instantiation time of this class
because the `object` is still `None`. Hence, it is lazily created
once the inspection methods are first required. At this point in time,
it is guaranteed by the auto-documenter base class that `object` is
then already correctly provided and the `ModelInspector` works as
expected.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticAutoDoc.get_field_name_or_alias
documentation:
If `field-swap-name-and-alias` is enabled, provide alias (if
present) for given field.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticAutoDoc.get_non_inherited_members
documentation:
Return all member names of autodocumented object which are
prefiltered to exclude inherited members.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticAutoDoc.resolve_inherited_validator_reference
documentation:
Provide correct validator reference in case validator is inherited
and explicitly shown in docs via directive option
`inherited-members`.

More concretely, inherited validators are not shown from parent class
unless directive option `inherited-members` is used. The validator
references may either point to the parent class or the child class.
This logic is implemented here.

Composite to provide single namespace to access all **autodoc_pydantic**
relevant documenter directive functionalities.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter.can_document_member
documentation: Filter only pydantic models.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter.document_members
documentation: Modify member options before starting to document members.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter.hide_inherited_members
documentation:
If inherited-members is set, make sure that these are excluded from
the class documenter, too

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter.hide_validator_members
documentation: Add validator names to `exclude_members`.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter.hide_reused_validators
documentation: Add reused validators to `exclude_members` option.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter.format_signature
documentation: If parameter list is to be hidden, return only empty signature.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter.add_content
documentation: Delegate additional content creation.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter.add_collapsable_schema
documentation: Adds collapse code block containing JSON schema.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter.add_erdantic_figure
documentation:
Adds an erdantic entity relation diagram to the doc of an
pydantic model.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter.add_config_summary
documentation: Adds summary section describing the model configuration.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter._get_idx_mappings
documentation:
Get index positions for given members while respecting
`OptionsSummaryListOrder`.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter._get_reference_sort_func
documentation:
Helper function to create sorting function for instances of
`ValidatorFieldMap` which first sorts by validator name and second by
field name while respecting `OptionsSummaryListOrder`.

This is used for validator summary section.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter._get_validator_summary_references
documentation:
Filter and sort validator-field mappings for validator summary
section.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter._build_validator_summary_rest_line
documentation:
Generates reST line for validator-field mapping with references for

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter.add_validators_summary
documentation:
Adds summary section describing all validators with corresponding
fields.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter._get_base_model_validators
documentation: Return the validators on the model being documented

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter._get_inherited_validators
documentation:
Return the validators on inherited fields to be documented,
if any

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter.add_field_summary
documentation: Adds summary section describing all fields.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter._get_base_model_fields
documentation: Returns all field names that are valid members of pydantic model.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter._get_inherited_fields
documentation: Return the inherited fields if inheritance is enabled

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter._get_tagorder
documentation: Get tagorder for given `name`.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter._sort_summary_list
documentation:
Sort member names according to given sort order
`OptionsSummaryListOrder`.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter._get_field_summary_line
documentation: Get reST for field summary for given `member_name`.

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter._stringify_type
documentation:
Get proper string representation of type for given `member_nane`

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.autodoc_pydantic.directives.autodocumenters.PydanticModelDocumenter._convert_json_schema_to_rest
documentation: Convert model's schema dict into reST.
Represents specialized Documenter subclass for pydantic models.
